params.prompt: Use the attached reference photo as the founder likeness reference. Create a premium 4:5 Instagram PROGRAM GRAPHIC for Limitless Club. Composition: left side realistic human founder in light gray blazer and black shirt, right side elegant AI team interface with three agents. The human should feel like a credible Thai founder/educator, warm smile, professional posture. Style: Midnight Luxe Editorial, black graphite background, silver typography, electric blue highlights, subtle premium UI. Required text: LIMITLESS CLUB; HERMES AGENT; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; Build the team that never sleeps.; คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; Chief of Staff Agent; Content Agent; Vibe Coding Agent; สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Clean, premium, mobile readable, safe margins, no extra logos, no misspelled duplicate text.
